emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Radisson Blu Hotel & Spa Sligo website and wanted to share some honest observations. No pitch.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 71/100
========================================

Issues found: 9

HIGH PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing meta description
  Meta descriptions appear below your link in Google. Without one, Google picks random text.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- No analytics tracking
  Without analytics, you cannot see how visitors find you or what they do on your site.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- No schema markup
  Schema helps Google show your hours, reviews, and events in search results.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- No semantic navbar
  A nav tag helps screen readers and search engines find your menu.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- No favicon
  Browser tabs show a blank icon instead of your brand.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing HSTS header
  HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing Content Security Policy
  CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing X-Frame-Options header
  Without this, your site could be embedded in an iframe on another site (clickjacking risk).

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
  This prevents MIME-type sniffing attacks.

WHAT IS WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Page title is set
+ Uses H1 heading
+ No mixed content
+ 2 images on the page
+ Efficient CSS setup
+ Light script load (1 scripts)
+ Good page size (15.3KB)
+ Clean sans-serif body font
+ Uses modern CSS layout (Flexbox/Grid)
+ Viewport meta tag present (mobile-friendly setup)
+ Uses modern rounded corners / cards
+ Uses shadows for visual depth
+ Contact form/page found on: /contact-us, /reservations
+ SSL certificate valid ÔÇö 165 days remaining

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.
If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
Websites for small businesses in Ireland.

issues.detail: Meta descriptions appear below your link in Google. Without one, Google picks random text.
issues.label: Missing meta description
issues.check: Google your site name. See what text appears under the link. If it is gibberish or missing, meta description is absent.
issues.siteHint: You lose control over how your site appears in search results.

issues.detail: Schema helps Google show your hours, reviews, and events in search results.
issues.label: No schema markup
issues.check: Search for your business on Google. Does it show a Knowledge Panel with hours and reviews?
issues.siteHint: Detailed search results get higher click-through rates.

issues.detail: A nav tag helps screen readers and search engines find your menu.
issues.label: No semantic navbar
issues.check: Open a screen reader or check page structure with DevTools.

issues.detail: Without analytics, you cannot see how visitors find you or what they do on your site.
issues.label: No analytics tracking
issues.check: Check the page source for references to gtag, analytics.js, or fbq.
issues.siteHint: You are flying blind - no data on what pages work or where traffic comes from.

issues.detail: Browser tabs show a blank icon instead of your brand.
issues.label: No favicon
issues.check: Look at the browser tab. Is there a small icon next to the page title?
issues.siteHint: A favicon reinforces brand identity and makes tabs recognizable.

issues.detail: HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.
issues.label: Missing HSTS header
issues.check: Open DevTools ÔåÆ Network ÔåÆ click the first request ÔåÆ look for "strict-transport-security".
issues.siteHint: HSTS is a simple config that hardens your site against protocol downgrade attacks.

issues.detail: CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.
issues.label: Missing Content Security Policy
issues.check: Check DevTools Console for CSP-related warnings.
issues.siteHint: A basic CSP blocks most common script injection attacks.

issues.detail: Without this, your site could be embedded in an iframe on another site (clickjacking risk).
issues.label: Missing X-Frame-Options header
issues.check: Check if the site has X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN in response headers.
issues.siteHint: Without this, others could embed your site on malicious pages.

issues.label: Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
issues.check: Check DevTools Network tab for the header.
